summary: Classified the five seeded PRs only. No security-sensitive hydrated item was present. No merge recommendation is safe because none has the required complete merge preflight; #79811 also has an unresolved Codex review comment, #90450 has failing checks in the full artifact, and all open seeded PRs carry merge-risk labels that block executable Clownfish repair artifacts in this run. #95274 is already merged and closed on current main.
